text: Stepping through glass doors into a space dedicated to research and development, I feel an anticipatory curiosity well up inside me. The bright, colorful displays beckon with the promise of innovation. Surrounded by evidence of human ingenuity, I am aware of the blend of creativity and inquiry that permeates the air. Here, I am reminded of how easily ideas can leap from imagination to reality when nurtured in the right environment. This intersection of art and science fills me with a sense of possibility, yet also reminds me of the responsibilities that come with new knowledge.
